wins_analysis: No wins today as zero trades were placed. The system correctly filtered out low-quality SELL setups that conflicted with the trending_up regime, preserving capital.
losses_analysis: No losses today. The filtering logic worked as intended — both TATASTEEL SELL setups had zone scores below 60 and were correctly rejected in an uptrending market.
regime_impact: The trending_up regime (Nifty +0.5%, ADX 25) made SELL setups contra-trend and inappropriate. The system needs BUY/demand zone setups to capitalize on this regime. The lack of qualifying BUY setups across all 50 Nifty stocks suggests the scanner may not be finding demand zones effectively in an already-extended uptrend.

improvements.action: Add a BUY-bias filter: when regime is trending_up and ADX>20, completely suppress SELL setups unless zone score exceeds 75 AND the stock itself is in a downtrend (stock RSI<40). This avoids wasting scanner slots on contra-trend setups.
improvements.reason: Both setups today were SELL in a trending_up market — they should never have appeared in top recommendations. Scanner capacity was wasted on unactionable setups.

improvements.action: Expand demand zone detection to include pullback-to-EMA setups (e.g., price pulling back to 20EMA in stocks trending above 50EMA) when market regime is trending_up. Look for stocks like HDFCBANK, RELIANCE, INFY, TCS that may be consolidating within uptrends.
improvements.reason: Zero BUY setups found across 50 Nifty stocks in an uptrending market indicates the scanner is too narrow — it likely only detects horizontal supply/demand zones and misses trend-continuation entries.

improvements.action: Implement a 'no-trade-is-fine' daily acknowledgment but also track consecutive zero-trade days. If 3+ consecutive days have zero trades, temporarily lower minimum zone score to 55 for regime-aligned setups only to avoid prolonged inactivity.
improvements.reason: Today was correctly a no-trade day, but persistent inactivity means missed opportunities. Need a controlled relaxation mechanism for regime-aligned setups.

improvements.action: For tomorrow's scan, specifically monitor TATASTEEL for a BUY setup at its demand zones (likely around 182-184 range) rather than repeatedly attempting the 187-191 supply zone sells that keep failing to qualify.
improvements.reason: TATASTEEL has appeared as the only candidate two days running but always as a SELL against the trend. If the stock is rising with the market, its demand zones are more relevant.

improvements.action: Run the scanner at 9:30 AM (15 min after open) AND again at 10:30 AM to catch stocks that gap up, consolidate, and form intraday demand zones in the first hour — these are high-probability BUY entries in trending_up regimes.
improvements.reason: The single 1:06 PM scan may be too late to catch morning pullback entries that already played out. Earlier dual-scan catches more setups in trending markets.

tomorrow_focus: Prioritize BUY setups on large-cap Nifty stocks pulling back to intraday or daily demand zones, especially if market regime remains trending_up with VIX staying below 14.

symbol_notes.TATASTEEL.NS: Stop looking for SELL setups here — the stock is rising with the market. Only consider if it forms a fresh demand zone near 182-184 for a BUY, or if regime flips bearish.
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Monitor for pullback BUY — heavyweight likely participating in Nifty uptrend, may offer demand zone entry on any dip.
symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Watch for consolidation breakout or pullback to demand — high beta to Nifty in trending regimes.
